title: Random drop and recipe
description: A random drop and recipe datapack
body:
If you want to randomize this Minecraft datapack, visit:  
https://random-drop-recipe.pages.dev

## Random Drop & Recipe Datapack

This datapack fully randomizes **block drops** and **crafting recipes** in Minecraft.

After enabling the datapack, blocks no longer drop their original items. Instead, each block is assigned a random drop. In addition, all crafting table recipes are randomized, meaning original crafting outputs are no longer valid.

The randomization is consistent within the same world, ensuring logical progression and discoverability while significantly increasing unpredictability and challenge compared to vanilla gameplay.
